name: checkbox-with-text
visual_summary: A checkbox with accompanying static text is a simple UI element used to present a yes/no option to the user. It's typically used in forms, settings pages, or surveys where the user needs to make a binary choice. This component is ideal for situations where the choice is not complex or nuanced.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready checkbox component with the following characteristics:

Name: checkbox-with-text
Description: A checkbox with accompanying static text is a simple UI element used to present a yes/no option to the user. It's typically used in forms, settings pages, or surveys where the user needs to make a binary choice. This component is ideal for situations where the choice is not complex or nuanced.
Style: default, minimal
Interactions: clickable, toggle
Tags: checkbox, text, form, toggle, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
